CARSHUNTER 1447 Logistics & PMS Governance — Canonical Reference (Frozen)
- Core law: [CARSHUNTER/PMS-LAW-DOC-LIFECYCLE-001_Document_Lifecycle_and_Economic_Conservation.md](CARSHUNTER/PMS-LAW-DOC-LIFECYCLE-001_Document_Lifecycle_and_Economic_Conservation.md). No edits to this artifact.

Read first (authoritative sources)
- Rules/actions/validators: [CARSHUNTER/PMS_rules_v2.json](CARSHUNTER/PMS_rules_v2.json); naming/path spec: [CARSHUNTER/CARSHUNTER_NAMING_AND_PATH_RULES_v2.json](CARSHUNTER/CARSHUNTER_NAMING_AND_PATH_RULES_v2.json). Never hard-code categories, statuses, paths.
- Human briefs: [CARSHUNTER/CARSHUNTER_1447_v2.md](CARSHUNTER/CARSHUNTER_1447_v2.md), [CARSHUNTER/PMS_DOCUMENT_REGISTRY_API_v1.md](CARSHUNTER/PMS_DOCUMENT_REGISTRY_API_v1.md); regulator view: [pms_govern/REGULATOR_EXPLANATION.md](pms_govern/REGULATOR_EXPLANATION.md).

Document plane (CARSHUNTER/)
- ID format: DAY3_MON3_CATEGORY_1447_SEQ scoped per `{period}:{CATEGORY}` (period label `YYYY:LUNAR`). IDs are immutable; reversals happen via RETURN/CREDIT docs only.
- Paths: `CARSHUNTER/{period}/{function}/{category_path}`; mapping in naming spec (offers→`03_INVENTORY_OFFERS/`, contracts→`01_Accounting/02_Contracts/`, credits→`01_Accounting/04_CreditNotes/`). Use v2 layout for new docs; keep v1 only for legacy.
- Event cascade: `OFFER_CREATED`→`OFFER_SENT`→`OFFER_ACCEPTED` emits `CONTRACT_CREATED`; `CONTRACT_SIGNED` emits `INVOICE_CREATED`; `RETURN_REGISTERED` may create RETURN+CREDIT (link validators must pass).
- Registry API is the sole writer for ids/paths/events. Do not drop files directly; follow payload/rejection semantics in [CARSHUNTER/PMS_DOCUMENT_REGISTRY_API_v1.md](CARSHUNTER/PMS_DOCUMENT_REGISTRY_API_v1.md).
- Required validators (must exist and must be applied on all writes): `IdPattern`, `PathMatchesSpec`, `CreditNotExceedInvoice` (see rules file).

Governance plane (pms_govern/)
- QGED boundary: [pms_govern/main.py](pms_govern/main.py) and [pms_govern/qged_gate.py](pms_govern/qged_gate.py) must ALLOW before any exposure/ledger/execution. Never bypass this gate.
- Authority config + signer roles in [pms_govern/config/Rules_roles.yaml](pms_govern/config/Rules_roles.yaml); enforced by `SigningPolicy`/`AuthorityEngine` in [pms_govern/gcc_engine.py](pms_govern/gcc_engine.py). Map signer IDs→roles before `SigningPolicy.allows`.

Ledger and evidence invariants
- Immutable ledger in [pms_govern/immutable_ledger.py](pms_govern/immutable_ledger.py) is append-only; never edit ledger.jsonl manually. Append failures abort; use `verify_integrity()` for hash-chain checks.
- Minimal execution in [pms_govern/minimal_execution.py](pms_govern/minimal_execution.py) is guarded by QGED decision and mutates only in-memory flags for approved actions.
- Evidence emission in [pms_govern/execution_evidence.py](pms_govern/execution_evidence.py) records irreversible outcomes.

Language & disclosure
- Respond in English unless asked otherwise; keep original language for quoted names/paths/terms.
